title: Validation Evaluation
description: Records the comparison result between the predicted regime and the observed market outcome. Conforms to schema.org Observation type — see 008-schema-org-mapping-v01.md.

@type.description: Maps to schema.org Observation — an evaluation of prediction accuracy.

predictionId.description: Links to the prediction Observation. Maps to observationAbout[0] in schema.org.

outcomeId.description: Links to the outcome Observation. Maps to observationAbout[1] in schema.org.

isCorrect.description: Boolean accuracy flag. Maps to variableMeasured as PropertyValue in schema.org.

deviationScore.description: Magnitude of error in regime alignment. Maps DIRECTLY to marginOfError in schema.org — see 008-schema-org-mapping-v01.md.
